title: Assorted Mixed Alkaline Button Cell Batteries AG1/LR621 | AG3/LR41 | AG4/LR66 | AG10/LR54 | AG12/LR43 | AG13/LR44 Battery for Watches, Calculators, Key Fobs, Toys (Pack of 100)
features: Assorted set of 1.5V alkaline button cell batteries consists AG1/LR621 | AG3/LR41 | AG4/LR66 | AG10/LR54 | AG12/LR43 | AG13/LR44 coin cells.
These mixed alkaline multipack coin batteries offer reliable performances and a long shelf life.
This multipack of various 1.5V alkaline coin cells comes in a blister card of 50 or 2 cards of 50.
These button cells are the ideal replacement batteries for daily use in a variety of devices including watches, pocket calculators, remote car keys, toys, remote controls etc
These batteries are compatible for long operating times and high voltage stability. Usage of the batteries can range in temperature from -20°C to + 60°C
